title: Arson docket opened after Thursday's Bossiesgif fire
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Plettenberg Bay detectives are investigating whether arson could be the cause of the second Bossiesgif fire in the early hours of Thursday 7 August.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Plettenberg Bay detectives are investigating whether arson could be the cause of the second Bossiesgif fire in the early hours of Thursday 7 August."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies said circumstances surrounding the incident are under investigation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"About 20 homes were destroyed in the fire.","html":"About 20 homes were destroyed in the fire."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Plettenberg Bay detectives have opened an arson docket, according to Spies.","html":"Plettenberg Bay detectives have opened an arson docket, according to Spies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous Articles","html":"Previous Articles"},{"type":"list","items":["Calling for support after destruction of over 100 structures in fires","Bossiesgif and Smutsville fires aftermath"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Arson docket opened after Thursday's Bossiesgif fire
